---
title: "SBS-LLM experiment"
author:
  - name: "Maria Cuellar"
date: today
bibliography: references.bib
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    classoption:
      - 11pt
      - oneside
    toc: false
    number-sections: true
  docx: default
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{authblk}
  - \usepackage{geometry}
  - \geometry{letterpaper}
  - \usepackage{graphicx}
  - \usepackage{amssymb}
  - \usepackage{amsmath}
  - \usepackage{url}
  - \usepackage{comment}
  - \usepackage{booktabs}
  - \usepackage{setspace}
  - \usepackage{lineno}
  - \PassOptionsToPackage{hyphens}{url}
  - \usepackage{hyperref}
  - \floatingpenalty=20000
  - \widowpenalty=150
  - \usepackage{xcolor}
  - \newcommand\red[1]{\textcolor{red}{#1}}
  - \usepackage[normalem]{ulem}
  - \makeatletter
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(cluster)
library(knitr)
library(poLCA)
```

# Abstract

Add a structured abstract here.

# Introduction
